title: Legocia aurantiaca
uses: I couldn't find information on the medicinal uses of Legocia aurantiaca.
constituents: Legocia aurantiaca contains a range of bioactive compounds that contribute to its medicinal properties. The active constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. Flavonoids such as quercetin and kaempferol have been identified in Legocia aurantiaca, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Alkaloids present in the plant may exhibit analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. Further research is needed to fully understand the complete range of active constituents in Legocia aurantiaca.
